goal: Ensure DeepSeek prompt context and strict tool-schema operator surfaces expose version evidence for production auditability.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Strict schemas include an internal schema_version field, but context state and human-facing schema listings omit prompt/schema version evidence, weakening auditability for the plan requirement that every prompt/tool schema is versioned.
